businessName: The Husband & Wife Home Team - FindHappyAZ.com
description: The Husband & Wife Home Team is a Veteran-led Arizona real estate team serving buyers and sellers with clear guidance, strong negotiation, and trusted market expertise. Veterans benefit from our VA Loan Certification, military-minded service, and understanding of VA financing, appraisals, concessions, and offer strategy—helping them buy or sell with confidence. Agent: Elizabeth Dine - Keller Williams Realty Phoenix
